text: This province gets +2 strength while you have a Fire role. Interrupt: When this province is broken, choose a dishonored character – discard that character.
name: Abandoning Honor

text: Sincerity. Reaction: After the draw phase begins, if you have lower honor than an opponent – look at the top 3 cards of your conflict deck and put them back in any order.
flavorText: "Assume anything we see is probably dangerous."
name: Hiruma Kogoe

text: This character gets +2[conflict-political] while you have claimed the [element-air] or [element-fire] ring.
flavorText: "How adorable that you would wear something your little brother made for you."
name: Sadane Student

text: Action: During a conflict, spend 1 fate to the [element-fire] ring. Choose a character – honor or dishonor that character.
flavorText: "The secrets of the elements are not kept by the kami alone."
name: Master Alchemist

text: Limit 1 per deck. Action: During a conflict at this province, lose 1 honor – this province gets +1 strength until the end of the conflict. (Unlimited.)
name: The Wrath of the Kami

text: Covert. Reaction: After this character wins a [conflict-political] conflict, choose a character you control – honor that character. Draw 1 card.
flavorText: "I like to think of myself as the 'mane' event."
name: Ikoma Ikehata

text: Action: Sacrifice this holding, choose a Weapon attachment in your discard pile – return that attachment to your hand.
flavorText: "This is the spear of Matsu Okimoto. Do not dishonor his memory."
name: Ancestral Armory

text: While this character is defending, if you control a participating Courtier or Shugenja character, this character does not bow as a result of conflict resolution.
flavorText: "I need not understand the Elemental Masters' wisdom, so long as it remains safe with them."
name: Chikai Order Protector

text: Reaction: After you win a conflict, choose a player – that player loses 1 honor. (Unlimited.)
flavorText: "The clans cannot strike at what they cannot perceive."
name: Soshi Shiori

text: This character gets +2[conflict-military] while you have claimed the [element-water] or [element-void] ring.
name: Battle Maiden Recruit

text: Attach to a Berserker character. Restricted. Action: During a conflict in which attached character is attacking, choose a defending character and select either [conflict-military] or [conflict-political] – set that character's selected skill to 0 until the end of the conflict.
name: Wicked Tetsubō

text: Fire role only. While you have the Imperial Favor, attached character gets +1 glory. Reaction: After you win a [element-fire] conflict — honor attached character.
name: Icon of Favor

text: Reaction: After a Duelist character you control wins a duel – dishonor the losing character.
flavorText: "Surely, your blade must have been caught in its sheath for your draw to have been so slow."
name: Insult to Injury

text: Action: While attached character is participating in a conflict, bow and sacrifice this attachment – until the end of the conflict, each non-unique participating character gets -2[conflict-military].
name: Smoke

text: Void role only. Forced Interrupt: When the fate phase ends, if attached character is ready – resolve a second fate phase after this one. (Max 1 per round.)
name: Jurōjin's Curse

text: Play only if the bid on your honor dial is higher than an opponent's. Action: During a conflict, look at the top card of an opponent's conflict deck – either immediately play that card as if it were in your hand or discard it.
name: Infiltrator

text: While this character is participating in a conflict, you are considered to control an additional character in this conflict.
flavorText: "We have seen much that is strange from the world. That our allies might be called strange is merely a compliment." - Shinjo Altansarnai
name: Shiksha Scout

text: Action: Lose 1 honor. Choose a character you control – move this attachment to that character. Then, remove 1 fate from that character.
name: Invocation of Ash

text: Action: During a [conflict-political] conflict – until the end of the conflict, each time a player triggers an ability on a non-Courtier character, he or she loses 1 honor (Max 1 per conflict.)
name: Breach of Etiquette

text: Air role only. Reaction: After this character wins a conflict, lose 1 honor – gain 1 fate. (Unlimited.)
flavorText: "Nothing compares with a fresh sea breeze."
name: Mantis Seafarer
